mapper.select:
SELECT c.*,
( select IF(c.parent_id = c.replay_id, null, cup.nickname) FROM cat_gan_da_shi_comment p INNER JOIN cat_user cup ON c.create_by = cup.id and cup.deleted = '0' WHERE p.id = c.parent_id ) as replayName,
cu.nickname as createByName FROM cat_gan_da_shi_comment c INNER JOIN cat_user cu ON c.create_by = cu.id and cu.deleted = '0'
AND c.post_id = #{param.postId}
AND c.parent_id = #{param.parentId}
AND c.parent_id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.create_time
DESC
